untranslatable_reason: This signal requires cross-sectional ranking across an asset universe (percentile-based portfolio formation). The allowed indicators only support single-asset technical analysis. Percentile ranking, portfolio construction, and comparative forward-return analysis require universe-level operations not available in the single-asset indicator set. The 'returns' indicator cannot be used as a percentile threshold—it measures absolute returns, not relative rank within a universe.
translation_notes: ARONSON_DRY_0_2 is a momentum/relative strength strategy that requires: (1) ranking all assets by 6-month historical return, (2) forming long positions in top 5% and short positions in bottom 5%, (3) measuring predictive power via return spread. This is fundamentally a cross-sectional strategy incompatible with single-instrument technical indicators. A proper implementation requires portfolio-level backtesting framework with ranking and rebalancing logic.
